title: Declarative Automation Bundles will soon default to use the direct deployment engine
body:
On July 24, 2026, Declarative Automation Bundles will start using the direct deployment engine by default instead of the Terraform deployment engine. This will trigger a migration for all bundles still using the Terraform deployment engine.

For more information about the direct deployment engine and migration from the Terraform deployment engine, see [Migrate to the direct deployment engine](/aws/en/dev-tools/bundles/direct).

The Terraform deployment engine will eventually be removed and no longer available.

ref_links.text: Migrate to the direct deployment engine
